mapper.select: select s.service_id,s.service_name,s.service_describe,s.service_state from services s left join item on s.service_id = item.service_id where item.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert:
insert into item
order_id, user_id, service_id, create_time, update_time,
#{orderId}, #{userId}, #{serviceId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime},
mapper.update:
update item
user_id = #{userId},
service_id = #{serviceId},
create_time = #{createTime},
update_time = #{updateTime},
where order_id = #{orderId}
update item set user_id = #{userId}, service_id = #{serviceId}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} where order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.select: SELECT i.order_id AS orderId, i.user_id AS userId, u.name AS username, s.service_name AS serviceName, s.service_describe AS serviceDescribe, i.create_time AS createTime, i.update_time AS updateTime, i.manage_status AS manageStatus FROM item i LEFT JOIN user u ON i.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN services s ON i.service_id = s.service_id ORDER BY i.create_time DESC

SELECT i.order_id AS orderId, i.user_id AS userId, u.name AS username, s.service_name AS serviceName, s.service_describe AS serviceDescribe, i.create_time AS createTime, i.update_time AS updateTime, i.manage_status AS manageStatus FROM item i LEFT JOIN user u ON i.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN services s ON i.service_id = s.service_id WHERE i.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY i.create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE item SET manage_status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.select: SELECT i.order_id AS orderId, i.user_id AS userId, i.service_id AS serviceId, i.create_time AS createTime, i.update_time AS updateTime, i.manage_status AS manageStatus, u.name AS userName, u.email AS userEmail, s.service_name AS serviceName, s.service_describe AS serviceDescribe FROM item i LEFT JOIN user u ON i.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN services s ON i.service_id = s.service_id WHERE i.order_id = #{orderId}
SELECT u.email FROM user u LEFT JOIN item i ON i.user_id = u.id WHERE i.order_id = #{orderId}
